sections: Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Women's synchronized 10 metre platform
first_paragraph: The **women's synchronized 10 metre platform** competition at [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 18 with the preliminary round in the morning and the final in the evening session.

The **women's synchronized 10 metre platform** competition at [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 18 with the preliminary round in the morning and the final in the evening session.

## Medalists

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_synchronized_10_metre_platform&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Medalists")]

| Gold | Silver | Bronze |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Wang Hao](/wiki/Wang_Hao_(diver) "Wang Hao (diver)") [Chen Ruolin](/wiki/Chen_Ruolin "Chen Ruolin")  *[China](/wiki/China_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "China at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships")* | [Alexandra Croak](/wiki/Alex_Croak "Alex Croak") [Melissa Wu](/wiki/Melissa_Wu "Melissa Wu")  *[Australia](/wiki/Australia_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Australia at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships")* | [Christin Steuer](/wiki/Christin_Steuer "Christin Steuer") [Nora Subschinski](/wiki/Nora_Subschinski "Nora Subschinski")  *[Germany](/wiki/Germany_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Germany at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships")* |

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Women%27s_synchronized_10_metre_platform&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Results")]

The preliminary round was held at 10:00 local time.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The final was held at 17:15.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

***Green** denotes finalists* The top twelve teams advance to the final.

| Rank | Diver | Nationality | Preliminary | | Final | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
